india_trends.title: Sun Pharma’s Organon buy took shape over three months of intense negotiations
india_trends.summary: After intense negotiations, Sun Pharma is set to acquire Organon for $11.75 billion, marking a significant milestone for Indian overseas acquisitions. The deal aims to strengthen Sun Pharma's global footprint and enhance its offerings in women's health and biosimilars.

india_trends.title: How big is Organon’s biosimilar push for Sun Pharma?
india_trends.summary: The Organon acquisition positions Sun Pharma in the global biosimilars market amid efforts to monetize biologics patent expiries.

india_trends.title: Sun Pharma to acquire Organon for $11.75 billion in India’s biggest pharma deal
india_trends.summary: Sun Pharma, led by Dilip Shanghvi, has agreed to acquire US-based Organon in an all-cash deal worth $11.75 billion, marking the largest acquisition ever by an Indian pharmaceutical company. The deal values Organon at $14 per share and gives Sun Pharma a major global expansion boost, including entry

Gold Falls as Traders Weigh Restart of US-Iran Peace Talks
india_trends.summary: Gold fell as efforts to resume peace talks between the US and Iran remained at an impasse, two months into a war that’s upended global markets and raised inflation risks.

india_trends.title: A Warsh-Led Fed Stands to Reignite the Treasuries Steepener Bet
india_trends.summary: Wall Street strategists say that a Kevin Warsh-led Federal Reserve may jolt the $31 trillion Treasuries market out of its narrow trading ranges, urging investors to position for shorter-dated yields to eventually move lower.

india_trends.title: US stocks: S&P 500, Nasdaq, close slightly up in cautious start to a heavy earnings week
india_trends.summary: U.S. stocks saw modest gains as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq eked out small increases in muted trading. Investors are digesting recent record highs and anticipating a busy week with earnings reports, economic data, and the Federal Reserve's rate decision. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East also

india_trends.title: IHH Healthcare seeks its investor Mitsui's help to set up talks with Daiichi in a ₹11,800 crore dispute
india_trends.summary: Malaysia-based hospital operator IHH Healthcare has reached out to its largest shareholder Mitsui & Co. to help open communication with Japanese drugmaker Daiichi Sankyo, even as both sides continue legal battles in India and Japan over damages worth about ₹11,800 crore.

india_trends.title: Organon gives Sun Pharma scale and reach, but challenge lies in integration, execution
india_trends.summary: Sun Pharma has acquired Organon & Co for $11.75 billion. This deal provides Sun Pharma with expanded global scale and commercial reach. It also offers diversification into new segments like women's health and biosimilars. The acquisition is expected to strengthen Sun Pharma's position for future

india_trends.title: GCCs, large tech companies keep office leasing market robust
india_trends.summary: India’s office market recorded its strongest-ever first quarter in January–March, with gross leasing rising 10% year-on-year to 21.5 million sq ft, driven largely by pre-committed deals from big occupiers.

india_trends.title: RBI finalises new risk weight norms
india_trends.summary: To be eligible, loans must be extended to individuals or small businesses with turnover up to ?500 crore, fall under standard retail products, remain within a ?10 crore exposure cap per borrower, and form part of a diversified portfolio where no single borrower accounts for more than 0.2%.

india_trends.title: 'Trade deals with US, EU soon': Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: India is set to sign trade agreements with the European Union and the United States in the coming months. Following a pact with New Zealand, these deals signal India's expanding global trade reach. Additionally, discussions for a free trade agreement with the Russia-led Eurasian Economic Union are s

india_trends.title: Govt reviews divestment plans, IDBI Bank stake sale
india_trends.summary: Government officials are reviewing the IDBI Bank disinvestment strategy. This comes after weak investor interest and market volatility impacted the proposed sale. A core group of secretaries is deliberating on revised valuations and timelines. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman confirmed the strate

india_trends.title: Expected credit loss rules: New provisioning framework to come into force in April 2027
india_trends.summary: The new ECL guidelines would introduce a "staging framework" for asset classification under the ECL approach, replacing the existing incurred-loss-based provisioning framework. However, the central bank said in a note that it would retain the current 90-day overdue rule for classifying non-performin

india_trends.title: Power demand surges to 255.8 GW on Monday
india_trends.summary: India's power demand surged to 255.8 GW on Monday. This record was set due to intense heatwaves across the country. Delhi's power demand also crossed 7,000 MW for the first time in April. Tata Power Delhi Distribution met its highest demand of 2,030 MW this summer. The power ministry anticipates fur

india_trends.title: Leverage FTAs to widen market access: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal met with exporters and industry groups. They discussed ways to boost India's exports and utilize free trade agreements. Exporters requested extensions for export obligations and wider trade relief measures. Concerns about shipping costs and the need for an Indian shipp

india_trends.title: Philips looks to step up play in India’s growing discretionary market
india_trends.summary: Philips says global macroeconomic volatility has hit businesses over the past five years, but underlying demand trends are still supporting near-term growth, according to Deeptha Khanna, executive vice president and chief business leader (personal health).

india_trends.title: India growth to soften in near term, rebound later: Nomura
india_trends.summary: India's economy is set for a slowdown in the first half of FY27. Supply disruptions are expected to impact growth. However, demand remains strong. The economy is projected to recover in the latter half of the year. Nomura forecasts a full-year growth of 6.8%. Supportive policies and easing trade ten
